title: EffiSpray, a smart tool for optimum spraying application
subtitle: EffiSpray, ένα έξυπνο εργαλείο για βέλτιστη εφαρμογή ψεκασμού
description: A guide presenting EffiSpray, an innovative system developed by AGENSO to optimize plant protection product applications using variable rate spray technology and real-time environmental data. The tool includes an Android application providing weather-based forecasts, spray dose calculations, and tractor speed recommendations to enhance efficacy and minimize off-target drift.
